nodes.name: 佩里哈山脈
nodes.summary: 佩里哈山脈是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联48种鸟类，包括Band-tailed guan、紫冠雉、Black-fronted wood quail等48种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 锈翅斑尾雀
nodes.summary: 锈翅斑尾雀（Rusty-winged barbtail，学名 Premnornis guttuliger），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联8个分布地点节点。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The nominate subspecies of the rusty-winged barbtail is found in all three Andean ranges of Colombia and south through the Andes of Ecuador into those of Peru as far as the Department of Puno

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: venezuelanus is found in the Serranía del Perijá that straddles the Colombia/Venezuela border and in the Andes of Venezuela's Táchira state. It inhabits subtropical montane evergreen forest. In elevation it ranges between in Colombia and mostly between in Ecuador. It occurs locally as low as in Peru
